item.title: The Weakest Model in the Selector
item.description: A chain is only as strong unôÙder tenôÙsion as its weakôÙest link, and an AI chat sysôÙtem is, unôÙder norôÙmal deôÙsign choices, as seôÙcure as the weakôÙest model in the seôÙlecôÙtor. While this is relôÙaôÙtively easy to mitiôÙgate, AnôÙthropic is the only chat serôÙvice I know of that acôÙtuôÙally preôÙvents ......
